meta.name: timeline-pulse events
meta.note: Official science events and community-linked narrative events share one axis but never one label. `layer` and `claim_status` are authoritative; `date_label` and `short` are display hints.

events.title: First beam circulates the LHC
events.summary: Protons complete a full circuit of the Large Hadron Collider for the first time.

events.title: Higgs boson announced
events.summary: ATLAS and CMS announce the discovery of a Higgs-like boson. Timeline-lore communities later treat 2012 as a symbolic shift year — that reading lives on the lower lane, not this one.

events.title: Run 3 extended; HiLumi startup planned for June 2030
events.summary: CERN publishes an updated accelerator schedule: Run 3 extended, High-Luminosity LHC startup planned for June 2030.

events.title: The LHC switches off — Long Shutdown 3 begins
events.summary: The LHC ends Run 3 and enters Long Shutdown 3: maintenance, consolidation, and upgrade work to prepare the High-Luminosity LHC. This is the machine going quiet — on purpose, on schedule.

events.title: HiLumi LHC operation window
events.summary: Planned start of High-Luminosity LHC operation, per CERN's published schedule.

events.title: The 2012 shift wave
events.summary: Communities mark 2012 as a symbolic shift year; dream logs, threshold language, and rainbow-bridge imagery cluster around it.

events.title: Mandela Effect community expansion
events.summary: The classic catalog items — Berenstain, cornucopia, monocle — reach mainstream attention and the community grows an order of magnitude.

events.title: The machine silence window
events.summary: The LS3 years read as a collective calibration window: "while the machine rests, tune the inner field." A symbolic overlay on an official maintenance schedule.
events.attribution: Symbolic anchor — filed as reading, not event.

events.title: The Apophis window
events.summary: The 2029 close approach used as a serpent-of-chaos anchor and "transmutation window." Astronomical details deliberately unstated until sourced from official pages.
events.attribution: Symbolic anchor — astronomical details pending official source.
